common.heroTitle: Let us handle the speed. You enjoy the ride.

hero.description: Premium guided cycling on Bangkok's Skylane. Led by Athlete Leaders, supported by Hero riders, with photography, safety, and post-ride recovery all handled for you.
hero.whatsIncluded: Leaders, photos, safety · Bike rental separate

packages.formatDescription: Three curated formats designed for different group sizes. Every ride includes an Athlete Leader, Hero support riders, and photography.

duo.name: Duo
duo.description: An intimate ride for two. Perfect for couples, friends, or anyone who wants a more personal guided experience.

squad.name: The Squad
squad.description: Bring your friends for the perfect group ride. Our most popular format, with a Leader up front and a Hero rider keeping everyone safe.

peloton.name: The Peloton
peloton.description: The full experience. A larger group ride with maximum support, energy, and an unforgettable atmosphere.

packages.bringYourOwn: Or bring your own at no extra cost
packages.pageDescription: Three curated formats. Every ride guided by Athlete Leaders with full safety support, photography, and post-ride recovery included.

howItWorks.fromBookingToRecovery: From booking to recovery, we handle everything
howItWorks.subtitle: Six steps. Zero stress. Every detail curated so you can focus on what matters: the ride.

step1.title: Pick your ride
step1.description: Choose your date, time slot, and group size. See pricing instantly. Book at least 24 hours ahead.

step2.title: Pay seamlessly
step2.description: Scan the PromptPay QR with your amount auto-calculated. No manual inputs, no friction.

step3.title: Get prepped via LINE
step3.description: Receive your meetup location, ride details, and preparation tips. Complete your rider profile.

step4.title: Ride with confidence
step4.description: Your Athlete Leader guides the pace. Hero riders keep you safe. Just pedal and enjoy.

step5.title: Capture the moment
step5.description: Professional photography included. Get your shots from the ride delivered after the session.

step6.title: Recover & relax
step6.description: Electrolyte drinks and recovery refreshments. End the ride feeling taken care of.

gallery.seeWhatARideLooksLike: See what a ride looks like
gallery.guidedRidesEveryMorningAndEvening: Guided rides every morning and evening
gallery.feelTheRhythm: Feel the rhythm of the road beneath you
gallery.catchTheSunrise: Catch the sunrise from 23.5 km above the city

timeSlots.morningAndEvening: Mornings for performance and fresh air. Evenings for golden light and vibes. Every session on the Skylane's dedicated 23.5 km track at Suvarnabhumi.
timeSlots.rideLocation: Skylane · Happy and Healthy Bike Lane
timeSlots.morningDesc: Clean air, cool temps, quiet roads
timeSlots.eveningDesc: Golden light, sunset views, perfect atmosphere

earlyBird.label: Early Bird
earlyBird.mood: Fresh morning air, quiet roads, clean start. Perfect for performance-focused riders.

energyBooster.label: Energy Booster
energyBooster.mood: An energizing start to your day. Catch the sunrise over the Skylane as Bangkok wakes up.

lightChaser.label: Light Chaser
lightChaser.mood: Chase the afternoon light as the heat breaks. Ride into the golden glow.

goldenHour.label: Golden Hour
goldenHour.mood: The signature En-Joy Speed experience. Perfect light, perfect vibes, perfect photos.

twilightFinish.label: Twilight Finish
twilightFinish.mood: End your day with a cool evening breeze and a sunset finish on the Skylane.

timeSlots.bathroomStops: Bathroom stops at km 5, 11, and 16 · Pre-arranged by your Leader · Blue lane (relaxed) & Purple lane (fast)
timeSlots.overlap: Morning slots A1 and A2 overlap — only one can be booked per day.

whatsIncluded.everythingYouNeed: Everything you need, nothing you don't
whatsIncluded.subtitle: Every ride includes Leaders, safety support, photography, starter kit, and post-ride recovery.

starterKit.title: En-Joy Speed Pro-pack
starterKit.description: Padded cycling liners (yours to keep), energy gel, and a reusable eco mesh bag — ready at check-in.

photography.title: Professional Photography
photography.description: Action shots and group photos from your ride, delivered digitally after the session.

whatsIncluded.alsoIncluded: Also included: Athlete Leaders, Hero support riders, safety briefing, post-ride recovery (electrolytes), and weather monitoring.
whatsIncluded.rentalNote: Bike rental available separately — Hybrid 420 THB · Road 720 THB · Or bring your own.

faq.everythingYouNeedToKnow: Everything you need to know before your first ride.

questions.q: Do I need to bring my own bike?
questions.a: You can! But we also offer bike rentals. Hybrid bikes are 420 THB and road bikes are 720 THB per session. Just select your preference when booking.

questions.q: What fitness level do I need?
questions.a: Our rides cover approximately 23.5 km on Bangkok's Skylane. You should be comfortable cycling for about 2 hours at a moderate pace. Our Leaders adjust the pace to the group.
We monitor weather conditions closely. If rain is likely, we'll notify you in advance through LINE and offer options including rescheduling or a refund based on our weather policy.
Yes, riders must have their own insurance. Our service does not include personal injury or damage insurance. This is part of our safety waiver which you'll complete during onboarding.

questions.q: How far in advance should I book?
questions.a: Bookings must be made at least 24 hours before the session. Sessions often fill up quickly, especially evening golden hour slots, so we recommend booking early.
Every ride includes Athlete Leader guidance, Hero support riders, professional photography, electrolyte drinks and recovery refreshments. Bike rental is the only additional cost.
Yes, through your account or via LINE. Cancellation and refund terms depend on timing and weather conditions. Full details are provided during booking.

Just bring your sport shoes, comfortable cycling clothing, sunscreen, and a bidon (cycling water bottle). If you are renting a bike with us, a premium helmet is already included. We provide everything else you need for a frictionless ride.

cta.bookingDescription: Book your premium guided cycling session today. Limited spots per session, guaranteed personal attention.
cta.bookingNote: Book at least 24 hours in advance. Confirmation and meetup details sent via LINE.

testimonials.dontJustTakeOurWord: Don't just take our word for it
testimonials.hearFromRiders: Hear from riders who've experienced the Skylane with us.

reviews.name: Nita S.
reviews.quote: I was nervous about cycling 23 km but the Athlete Leaders made it feel effortless. The golden hour views were absolutely stunning.

reviews.name: Marcus L.
reviews.quote: Best organized group ride I've ever done. The Hero support riders made sure nobody got dropped. Felt safe the whole time.

reviews.name: Ploy & Tong
reviews.quote: We booked for our anniversary. The photos they took were incredible — professional quality. The starter kit was a lovely touch.

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.quote: Didn't know the Skylane existed until a friend told me about En-Joy Speed. Now it's my must-do every time I visit Bangkok.

about.letUsHandleTheSpeed: Let us handle the speed. You enjoy the ride.
about.aboutDescription: En-Joy Speed is a premium guided cycling service on Bangkok's Skylane — 23.5 km of elevated track at Suvarnabhumi. Athletic leadership, curated experiences, operational precision.

values.title: Safety First
values.text: Helmets required, conduct briefings given, and our Leaders have authority to ensure everyone stays safe.

values.title: Experience Design
values.text: From booking to post-ride recovery, every touchpoint is intentional. We craft experiences, not just rides.

values.title: Operational Precision
values.text: Structured slots, trained Leaders, weather monitoring, and seamless communication — invisible because it works.

values.title: Premium Simplicity
values.text: Beautiful doesn't mean complicated. Booking, rides, and recovery all follow the same principle: frictionless.

about.everyRideFollowsSameFormat: Every ride follows the same proven format — designed so you can focus on pedalling, not logistics.
beforeItems: Safety briefing: hand signals, lane rules, pacing, SOS procedures (15 min)
Starter kit distributed: cycling liners, energy gel, mesh bag
duringItems: Athlete Leaders set and maintain pace from the front
Hero Riders sweep the back — nobody gets left behind
23.5 km on the elevated Skylane at Suvarnabhumi
afterItems: Weather updates via LINE if relevant for upcoming sessions
about.noAddOnsNorSurprises: No add-ons, no surprises. Here's the full list of what comes with every booking.

athleteLeaders.title: Athlete Leaders
athleteLeaders.description: Elite local cyclists who set the pace, guide the route, and keep the group safe. They lead from the front.

heroRiders.title: Hero Support Riders
heroRiders.description: Sweep riders at the back watching over every participant. No one gets left behind.

professionalPhotography.title: Professional Photography
professionalPhotography.description: Action shots and group photos from your ride, delivered digitally after the session.

starterKit.title: En-Joy Speed Pro-pack
starterKit.description: Padded gel cycling liners (yours to keep), energy gel, and a reusable eco mesh bag.

safetyBriefing.title: Safety Briefing
safetyBriefing.description: 15-minute orientation covering hand signals, lane rules, pacing, and SOS procedures.

weatherMonitoring.title: Weather Monitoring
weatherMonitoring.description: We track conditions for your ride window and communicate proactively via LINE if plans change.

readyToRideGuidance.title: Ready-to-Ride Guidance
readyToRideGuidance.description: Pre-ride checklist shared in advance: closed-toe shoes, athletic socks, sun protection, helmet required.

about.bringYourOwn: Or bring your own at no extra cost
about.meetThePeople: Meet the people who make every ride unforgettable
about.leadersNotJustGuides: Our Athlete Leaders aren't just guides — they're experienced cyclists who've dedicated themselves to making this the ride of your life.
about.teamDescription: Every morning, before the sun rises, the team is already prepping — bikes checked, route confirmed, energy ready.
safetyRules: Helmets and safety gear are mandatory for all riders.
Riders must confirm physical readiness for approximately 23.5 km of cycling.
Personal insurance is required — the service does not include injury or damage coverage.
All riders must follow instructions from Athlete Leaders at all times.
Leaders have authority to terminate participation immediately if safety is compromised.
A full health & safety waiver must be completed during onboarding before your ride.
about.pickADate: Pick a date, choose your group size, and we handle the rest.
about.rentalNote: Rental is directly through HHBL (Happy and Healthy Bike Lane). We facilitate the process. All rental bikes are professionally maintained and ready to ride. Helmet included with every rental.
about.meetingDescription: We meet at the Skylane (Happy and Healthy Bike Lane) at Suvarnabhumi. Look for Parking signs K and L.
about.meetingPointAlt: Meeting point — Parking sign K and L at Skylane
about.satelliteViewAlt: Satellite view of the Skylane bike lane from above
about.areaMapAlt: Map showing Skylane location near Suvarnabhumi
about.skylaneDesc: Happy and Healthy Bike Lane — 23.5 km elevated cycling track
about.parkingDesc: Free parking available. Arrive 15 minutes early for check-in and safety briefing.
about.pailinBio: Experienced cycling coach and LKB Cycling Club member. Pailin leads the morning golden hour rides and brings warmth, energy, and precision to every session. Her focus: making every rider feel confident from the first pedal stroke.
about.udornBio: Veteran cyclist and ride architect. Udorn designs the route pacing, manages group dynamics, and ensures every ride runs with military precision and genuine heart. He will match your pace, push you just enough, and make sure you finish with a smile.

contact.wedLoveToHearFromYou: We'd love to hear from you
contact.whetherYouHaveAQuestion: Whether you have a question about rides, pricing, or anything else — our team is ready to help.
contact.lineDesc: Fastest way to reach us. Typically replies within 30 minutes during business hours.
contact.emailDesc: For booking inquiries, partnerships, or general questions. We reply within 24 hours.
contact.locationDesc: Bangkok's elevated cycling track near Suvarnabhumi Airport. Meet-up point shared before your ride.
contact.hoursDesc: We ride during golden hour and blue hour for the best experience and cooler temperatures.
contact.checkOurFAQ: Check out our FAQ — it covers cancellations, weather policies, what to bring, and more.

footer.slogan: Let us handle the speed. You enjoy the ride. Premium guided cycling experiences on Bangkok's Skylane.

privacy.whoWeAreText: En-Joy Speed ("we," "us," or "our") operates the En-Joy Speed cycling experience booking platform available at enjoyspeed.com and through our LINE Official Account. We are based in Bangkok, Thailand and provide guided cycling experiences on the Skylane, Suvarnabhumi.
privacy.accountInfo: Account information: Name and email address when you create an account or verify your email. Optionally, phone number and LINE user ID if you choose to provide them.
privacy.bookingInfo: Booking information: Ride date and time preferences, group size, rider details (name, nickname, height, clothing size, cycling experience), emergency contact information, and special requests.
privacy.paymentInfo: Payment information: Payment slip images uploaded for PromptPay verification. We do not store credit card numbers or bank account details.
privacy.surveyInfo: Survey responses: Optional post-ride feedback including ratings, comments, and photo consent preferences.
privacy.technicalData: Technical data: IP address, browser type, device information, and cookies necessary for site functionality.
privacy.howWeUseYourInfoText: We use your information to process and manage your ride bookings, verify your identity and payment, communicate ride details and updates (including weather cancellations), provide customer support, assign appropriate equipment for your ride, contact emergency contacts if necessary during a ride, improve our services based on feedback, and send booking confirmations via email and LINE.
privacy.lineIntegrationText: When you interact with our LINE Official Account, we receive your LINE user ID and display name. We use this to send you booking confirmations, ride reminders, weather updates, and respond to your inquiries. We do not access your LINE contacts, timeline, or any other LINE data beyond what is necessary for our booking service. You can unfollow our LINE account at any time to stop receiving messages.
privacy.dataSharingText: We do not sell your personal information. We share data only with our ride leaders and support staff (rider details needed for your session), payment verification services, email and SMS delivery providers (for sending notifications), and hosting and infrastructure providers (Supabase, Vercel). We may disclose information if required by Thai law or to protect safety.
privacy.dataSecurityText: We implement industry-standard security measures including encrypted data transmission (HTTPS/TLS), secure server-side authentication, row-level security on our database, and secure storage for payment slip images. While no system is 100% secure, we take reasonable measures to protect your information.
privacy.dataRetentionText: We retain your account information for as long as your account is active. Booking records are retained for 2 years for business and legal purposes. Payment slip images are retained for 90 days after payment verification. You may request deletion of your account and associated data at any time.
privacy.yourRightsText: Under the Thailand Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA), you have the right to access, correct, delete, or transfer your personal data, withdraw consent for data processing, and file a complaint with the relevant authority. To exercise these rights, contact us at the details below.
privacy.cookiesText: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. We do not use advertising or tracking cookies. Third-party analytics may collect anonymized usage data to help us improve the site.
privacy.changesToThisPolicyText: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email or LINE message. The "Last updated" date at the top of this page indicates when it was last revised.
privacy.contactUsText: If you have questions about this privacy policy or your data, contact us through our LINE Official Account (@enjoyspeed) or by email at enjoyspeed.bkk@gmail.com.

terms.acceptanceText: By using the En-Joy Speed platform ("Service"), you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the Service. These terms apply to all users of the website, LINE Official Account, and booking system.
terms.ourServiceText: En-Joy Speed provides guided group cycling experiences at the Skylane, Suvarnabhumi. Through our platform, you can book rides, manage rider details, and process payments. All rides are supervised by trained Athlete Leaders and Hero Riders.
terms.bookingsAndPaymentsText: Bookings must be made at least 24 hours in advance. Upon booking, you will receive a PromptPay QR code for payment. Payment must be completed within 2 hours of booking. Bookings are confirmed only after payment has been verified by our team. Prices displayed at the time of booking are final. Bike rental fees are payable at the track on the day of the ride.
terms.cancellationsAndRefundsText: You may cancel a confirmed booking by contacting us via LINE or email at least 48 hours before the ride for a full refund. For cancellations within 48 hours, we offer a rain credit valid for 90 days. Weather cancellations initiated by En-Joy Speed entitle you to a full refund or rain credit at your choice. No-shows are not eligible for refunds.
terms.waiverAndLiabilityText: All riders must accept the liability waiver before participating. Cycling involves inherent risks including falls, injuries, and equipment failure. By accepting the waiver, you acknowledge these risks and agree that En-Joy Speed, its staff, and the circuit are not liable for injuries resulting from the activity, except in cases of gross negligence. Emergency contact information must be provided for all riders.
terms.riderResponsibilitiesText: Riders must follow all instructions from the Athlete Leader and Hero Riders, wear the provided safety equipment (helmet required), be in reasonable physical condition for cycling, not ride under the influence of alcohol or drugs, and report any equipment concerns before the ride begins.
terms.photographyAndContentText: We may take photographs and videos during rides for promotional purposes. By participating, you consent to being photographed unless you opt out via the post-ride survey or notify staff before the ride. You may request removal of specific photos by contacting us.
terms.accountSecurityText: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials. Do not share your verification codes with others. We will never ask for your password or OTP codes via LINE or email.
terms.modificationsText: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance. We will notify users of significant changes via email or LINE.
terms.governingLawText: These terms are governed by the laws of the Kingdom of Thailand. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Bangkok, Thailand.
terms.contactText: For questions about these terms, reach us via LINE (@enjoyspeed) or email at enjoyspeed.bkk@gmail.com.

errors.useCorrectLink: Please use the link we sent you after your ride.
